CheckTitle: 确保 Microsoft Defender for Open-Source Relational Databases 设置为“开启”
Description: 确保 Microsoft Defender for Open-Source Relational Databases 设置为“开启”
Risk: 开启 Microsoft Defender for Open-source relational databases 可为开源关系型数据库启用威胁检测，并在 Microsoft Defender for Cloud 中提供威胁情报、异常检测和行为分析能力。

Recommendation.Text: 启用 Microsoft Defender for Open-source relational databases 可实现更强的纵深防御，并借助 Microsoft Security Response Center (MSRC) 提供的威胁检测能力进行防护。
